_comment: EnergyPlus / urbanopt unit-suffix to kBtu-equivalent scaling factor. Used by clean_report.py's column matcher to bridge unit drift between what sensor_types.csv declares as the expected column unit and what urbanopt actually writes in default_feature_report.csv. Add a new entry here when a sim surfaces an unknown unit suffix (the matcher logs a warning and skips the column in that case). Non-energy units (m3, Gal, MT, lbs) are passthrough 1.0; the sensor's own conversion_factor in sensor_types.csv governs unit conversion for those.
